summary: Island apex predator. Tyrannosaurus rex remains the benchmark carnivore for containment doctrine and embryo security classification.
facts: Binocular vision — depth perception suited for ambush predation.
Femur stress analysis indicates sustained running capability.
InGen acoustic profile: low-frequency territorial roar, 120+ dB at source.
Embryo recovery authorized only under full field-team escort.
fieldNotes: Do not engage. If visual contact occurs, freeze and await extraction coordinates.
